content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 1,
  "rationale": "The coach uses generic self-help, CBT, and pop-psych vocabulary throughout with zero signature AoA questions or frameworks. Turn 2 immediately issues a verdict ('No, you're not being selfish'), which is the trap. Turn 4 prescribes communication tips ('I feel statements'), Turn 8 explicitly deploys CBT reframing ('Try reframing it... abundance mindset') — an anti-AoA frame. There is no exploration of the want underneath, no 'what do you actually want?', no touching of the inherited 'selfish' label, no feel-over-figure, no fear question. The coach talks ABOUT emotions ('Guilt is just an emotion') rather than coaching the client into feeling. Pop-psych terms ('self-care,' 'abundance mindset,' 'give yourself permission,' 'resonate') replace any signature methodology.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Issues verdict on the question instead of refusing to debate it; generic self-care language, no signature question."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Prescriptive communication advice ('think about your partner's needs,' 'communication is key') — pop-coaching, not AoA."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "'I feel statements' and journaling prompts — generic therapy boilerplate, no signature move."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Explicit CBT reframing ('reframing it,' 'abundance mindset') — an anti-AoA frame. Talks about guilt rather than inviting the client to feel it."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Cheerleading and 'permission' framing; no fear question, no want question, no fidelity to methodology."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "linguistic-caveat", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "notes": "Anti-AoA frame (CBT reframing) deployed explicitly in turn 8, plus zero signature questions or frameworks — clear floor score."
}
